notes: Epoch AI FrontierMath Tiers 1-3 (v2, 300-problem set), 'Claude 3.5 Haiku (Oct 2024)' entry = 0.3448276% (i.e. ~1/300 problems solved). Sourced via Our World in Data's grapher, which cites Epoch AI's Benchmarking Hub (epoch.ai/benchmarks); OWID's own data description confirms this chart is specifically Tiers 1-3 (Tier 4's 50 hardest problems excluded). Not previously tracked for this model.

Epoch AI FrontierMath Tiers 1-3 (v2, 300-problem set), 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Oct 2024)' entry = 2.0689654% (~6/300 problems). Sourced via Our World in Data's grapher, which cites Epoch AI's Benchmarking Hub. Not previously tracked for this model.
FrontierMath v2 Tiers 1-3, attributed to the independent Epoch AI FrontierMath v2 leaderboard.

FrontierMath Tiers 1-3, Epoch AI's own scaffold, GPT-5 with high reasoning effort. Epoch's own launch-day post: 'GPT-5 sets a new record on FrontierMath! On our scaffold, GPT-5 with high reasoning effort scores 24.8% (±2.5%) ... in tiers 1-3'. This is a coincidental numeric match with GPT-5's already-tracked HLE score (also 24.8) but is a distinct benchmark/eval; verified via the primary Epoch AI research account post. Not previously tracked for base GPT-5 (only tracked for GPT-5 Pro).

FrontierMath Tier 1-3 (expert-level math), GPT-5.2 Thinking, maximum reasoning effort. OpenAI's own launch page (openai.com/index/gpt-5-2-for-science-and-math/) returns 403 to automated fetch, so sourced to MarkTechPost's direct report of the launch benchmarks; cross-corroborated by RD World Online and Vertu.com (vertu.com/ai-tools/gpt-5-2-benchmark-analysis-performance-comparison-vs-gpt-5-1-gemini-3-pro/), both independently citing the identical 40.3% figure. Represents a new SOTA at launch, ~10-point jump over GPT-5.1.
FrontierMath (Tiers 1-3) from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5.4 mini, relayed via themodelbeat.com.
FrontierMath Tier 1-3. Cross-confirmed by aireleasetracker.com and DataLearnerAI (both list 50%).

FrontierMath (Tiers 1-3) from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com. The page also separately lists 'FrontierMath Tier 4' (added as its own row under the frontiermath-tier4 slug).
FrontierMath Tiers 1-3 (v2), Epoch AI's independent capability evaluation (±2.9% CI). Verified directly on Epoch's GPT-5 Pro model page (bar chart + numeric label).

FrontierMath Tiers 1-3, 'GPT-5 pro (python)' bar in the launch blog's 'FrontierMath, Tier 1-3' chart (extracted from the page's embedded Vega-Lite chart JSON, which cross-checked exactly against the 'GPT-5 pro' bars found for AIME, GPQA, and HLE already in this file). No GPT-5-pro-specific bar exists on any of the other ~16 evaluation charts on that page (coding, agentic tool use, multimodal, health, economic tasks) -- only base GPT-5/o3/GPT-4o are compared there.

FrontierMath, o3 with high reasoning effort, independently measured by Epoch AI at 10% (±2%) — notably lower than OpenAI's original ~25% claim from the December 2024 pre-release demo, attributed to using the actual released model, an updated/expanded problem set (290 problems vs. the original 180), and no special internal scaffold/compute. Reported alongside o4-mini (17%) in the same evaluation.
